name: Date Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Slowly add the sugar to the eggs and beat well.
2. Gradually incorporate the flour, salt, and baking powder, beating until smooth.
3. Stir in the vanilla extract.
4. Mix in the dates and pecans.
5. Transfer the mixture into a 9 x 13 inch pan lined with greased waxed paper.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 30 minutes.
7. Allow the bars to cool slightly, then cut into one-inch strips.
8. Roll each strip in powdered sugar.
9. Store in an air-tight container. For best flavor, allow the bars to season for several weeks before serving.
